ceoBriefing:
• Competitors cluster on price; differentiation is **latency + custody** — own the "sovereign desk" narrative.
• Ship a **checkpointed** Base mint path: policy gate at 7/10, human signature above 7, integrity hash on snapshots.
• Next 14 days: one public case study (redacted) + DR drill with restore token handshake.
